name: Original 12 Surviving Castles
description: Japan's 12 surviving wooden keeps that have endured unaltered since the Edo period or earlier.

name: UNESCO World Heritage Japan
description: Cultural and natural sites designated by UNESCO for their outstanding universal value.

name: National Treasures of Japan
description: Japan's finest cultural properties of exceptional historical and artistic significance designated by the Agency for Cultural Affairs.

name: Top 100 Castles of Japan
description: Certified premier castles selected by the Japan Castle Foundation for architectural and historical significance.

name: Three Great Gardens of Japan
description: Japan's three most celebrated traditional landscape gardens (Kenroku-en, Kairaku-en, Koraku-en).

name: Top Hot Springs & Onsen Towns
description: Premier traditional hot spring resorts celebrated for healing thermal waters, ryokan hospitality, and historic bathhouse culture.

name: Preserved Historic Towns
description: Exceptionally preserved Edo-period post towns, merchant quarters, and castle towns retaining authentic traditional wooden architecture.

name: Japan's Great Night Views & Observatories
description: Japan's most famous panoramic night views and sky deck observatories overlooking illuminated cityscapes and harbors.
